title: NoMobGrief
description: Disallows Creepers and Endermen from destroying your world.
body:
![Exploding Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54b1893a6ab4d18c1c53a632acf682fdbc048b8f.png)

A lightweight Minecraft plugin that prevents mobs from causing block damage and griefing your builds.

## ✨ Features
- Stops Creepers from creating explosions.
- Prevents Endermen from stealing blocks.

## 📦 Installation
1. Place the `.jar` file into your server's `plugins` folder.
2. Restart or reload your server.

## ⚙️ Configuration
Default `config.yml`:
```yml
doCreeperExplosions: false
doEndermanPickup: false
```

## 🔗 Links
